evidence: From I-HY_2022_14-FTR-00: "I/we offer to Provide the Works as may from time to time be instructed and in conformity with the conditions of contract, additional conditions of contract, Scope and activity schedule." evidence: From I-HY_2022_14-FTR-00: "I/We agree to abide by this Tender for the period of 120 days from the date, or the extended date if this has been extended, of expiry fixed for receiving the same" From ECC HK_FOT_20231115: "I/We agree to abide by this Tender for the period of [90 days]2 from the date, or the extended date if this has been extended, of expiry fixed for receiving the same"
